headline: The Biggest Things Driving the Nasdaq Lower Today: Iran Blockade Rattles Tech
summary: The NASDAQ Composite (^IXIC) opened Monday under pressure, slipping 0.34% in early trading after 21 hours of U.S.-Iran peace talks over the weekend collapsed without a deal. President Trump ordered a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, effective 10 a.m. ET Monday, sending oil prices surging and rattling growth-sensitive tech stocks. The session tests ... The Biggest Things Driving the Nasdaq Lower Today: Iran Blockade Rattles Tech

headline: Compeer Financial Transforms Agricultural Lending with FICO Platform
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., April 13, 2026--Compeer's has earned a 2026 FICO® Industry Vanguard Award for its use of FICO analytics and decision management technology in agricultural lending.

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Slip As Inflation And Oil Jitters Build
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Monday, Apr, 13 2026 US stock futures are softer this morning, with S&P 500 contracts down about 0.6% as investors react to a jump in energy costs and stronger than expected US inflation. Brent crude sits near US$102 a barrel, which feeds directly into fuel, transport and household bills. At the same time, US consumer prices for March rose 0.9% from February, mainly because of energy, while a key inflation gauge that strips out food and energy is at...
